description_long: A beautifully presented bowl of ramen sits atop a rectangular wooden tray, accompanied by a matching green ceramic spoon and a small condiment dish. The ramen bowl is deep and round, with a glossy green exterior and a decorative blue-and-white wave pattern on the inner rim. Inside the bowl, the ramen is topped with slices of pinkish pork, a halved soft-boiled egg with a golden yolk, sheets of dark green nori, and a scattering of green onions. The noodles are partially visible beneath the toppings, nestled in a rich, slightly opaque broth. A pair of wooden chopsticks rests neatly on the tray, completing the inviting presentation.
description: A green ceramic bowl of ramen with assorted toppings sits on a wooden tray, accompanied by a spoon, condiment dish, and chopsticks. The arrangement is visually appealing and detailed, with vibrant colors and textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ramen bowl with all toppings visible, chopsticks and condiment dish on the left, and the spoon handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bowl's depth and the decorative inner rim, with the spoon handle and chopsticks aligned along the tray's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the bowl, the spoon resting on the tray, and the chopsticks placed parallel to the tray's width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bowl's profile, the condiment dish and spoon separated, and a clear view of the nori and pork arrangement.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is deep and round with a glossy green exterior and a gold-trimmed rim. Its inner surface features a blue-and-white wave pattern, adding a traditional Japanese aesthetic. The ceramic material gives it a smooth, reflective finish.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are neatly arranged in distinct sections: nori sheets are propped vertically at the back, pork slices and a halved egg are placed side by side, and green onions are sprinkled over the noodles. The arrangement is balanced, with each topping clearly visible and separated.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are partially exposed, visible beneath the toppings but mostly submerged in the broth. Some strands peek out around the edges, adding texture to the presentation.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears slightly opaque and rich, with a creamy consistency. There are no large floating particles, but a subtle sheen of oil is visible on the surface.
attribute_utensil_presence: Both a green ceramic spoon and a pair of wooden chopsticks are present. The spoon rests on the tray beside the bowl, while the chopsticks are placed parallel to the tray's edge.
